title: Paper-facing wall/test-section coupled score and source-shape physics plan

decisions.decision: Use AGENT-498 as diagnostic falsification evidence, not as an admitted closure.
decisions.reason: PB2/PB3 candidates completed coupled scoring and improved mdot versus M3, but all-probe and TW RMSE degraded by about 35-49 K on Salt3/Salt4.

decisions.decision: Prioritize heater source redistribution, wall-temperature drive, axial mixing/upcomer exchange, and explicit upcomer/test-section wall/fluid coupling in that order unless active implementation results supersede the plan.
decisions.reason: Passive hA redistribution and total heat-removal magnitude were falsified as sufficient explanations for the temperature-shape failure.
